privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic data created during task setup (setup_task.sh). The input file contains enrollment data with: screened=18, randomized=14, completed=3, discontinued=2, resulting in calculated_active_count=9 (verified: 14-3-2=9). The protocol is identified as 'ZN-994' and site as '142'. The report must include 4 sections with Heading 1 style (Visit Details, Subject Enrollment, Protocol Deviations, Action Items) and conditional formatting targeting 'Open' status items (present in action items AI-02 and AI-03). All metadata claims are verified against hardcoded values in setup_task.sh.
